results.requirement_text: The system shall require a cancellation reason when an approved booking is cancelled.

test_cases.title: Cancel approved booking providing a cancellation reason
test_cases.objective: Verify that the system requires a cancellation reason when cancelling an approved booking
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.

steps.action: Exercise the configured capability using valid input consistent with the requirement.
steps.expected_result: The system prompts for a cancellation reason.

test_cases.expected_result: The system requires a cancellation reason when cancelling an approved booking.
assumptions: A cancellation action is available for approved bookings.
The system provides a means to input a cancellation reason.

traceability.coverage_item: Cancel approved booking providing a cancellation reason

test_cases.title: Attempt to cancel approved booking without providing a cancellation reason
test_cases.objective: Verify that the system does not allow cancelling an approved booking without a cancellation reason
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.

steps.action: Exercise the configured capability using invalid input consistent with the requirement.
steps.expected_result: The system rejects the cancellation attempt.

test_cases.expected_result: The system does not allow cancelling an approved booking without a cancellation reason.
assumptions: A cancellation action is available for approved bookings.
The system provides a means to input a cancellation reason.

traceability.coverage_item: Attempt to cancel approved booking without providing a cancellation reason

assumptions: A cancellation action is available for approved bookings.
The system provides a means to input a cancellation reason.

plans.requirement_text: The system shall require a cancellation reason when an approved booking is cancelled.

coverage_items.coverage_item: Cancel approved booking providing a cancellation reason
coverage_items.rationale: Verifies that the system accepts a cancellation when a reason is supplied, satisfying the requirement.

coverage_items.coverage_item: Attempt to cancel approved booking without providing a cancellation reason
coverage_items.rationale: Verifies that the system enforces the requirement by rejecting cancellation without a reason.

assumptions: A cancellation action is available for approved bookings.
The system provides a means to input a cancellation reason.
